description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The screen is large and bordered by a thin bezel, with no visible branding or stickers on the lid or palm rest. The keyboard is full-sized and recessed into the main body, with a trackpad centered below it. On the left and right sides, several ports are visible, including a USB port and a cable plugged in, suggesting connectivity options. The overall build appears robust, with a solid hinge connecting the display to the base, and the device sits flat on a surface with a low profile.
description: A matte black, modern laptop with a large screen, full keyboard, and visible side ports. The design is sleek and unbranded, with a robust hinge and no visible stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen, full keyboard, trackpad, and side ports with a cable attached.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and visible cable extending from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the screen, hinge, and the cable extending from the left side.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and the open screen, with the keyboard partially visible.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad visible.
